---
output:
  beamer_presentation:
    theme: "CambridgeUS"
    colortheme: "dolphin"
    fonttheme: "structurebold"
fontsize: 14pt
classoption: "aspectratio=169"
header-includes:
- \usepackage{caption}
- \captionsetup[figure]{labelformat=empty}
- \captionsetup[table]{labelformat=empty}
- \setbeamertemplate{page number in head/foot}[]{}
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
## Render the pdf
##rmarkdown::render(input = "./OMIT-01_2-Defining_Terms.Rmd", output_file = "./OMIT-01_2-Defining_Terms.pdf")

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```


## Today's Agenda
\LARGE

\textbf{Defining our terms:}

\vspace{.15in}

International political events

\vspace{.5in}

\begin{center}
Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2021)
\end{center}



## {.plain}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.95\paperwidth]{Images/01_2-syllabus.png}
\end{center}



## {.plain}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.95\paperwidth]{Images/01_2-syllabus2.png}
\end{center}



## For Today
\Large

Bring to class a news article that describes \textbf{a current, international political event}. 

\vspace{.2in}

Be ready to explain the \textbf{background} of the event and the characteristics of the event that make it \textbf{international} and \textbf{political}.



## {.plain}
\begin{center}
\includegraphics[keepaspectratio=true,width=.95\paperwidth]{Images/01_2-IR_Defined.png}
\end{center}




## For Friday
\Large

1. Labossiere (2008): Making logical arguments

2. (2021, Jan 9): The crying pity on the hill: The Capitol riot is a godsend for America's critics. The Economist.

3. Repnikova, M. (2021, Jan 15). No, the Chaos in America Is Not a Gift to China and Russia.
